title: Flake: Podman logs [It] podman logs partial log lines: *
body:
This test failure is appearing in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28159. I think the problem is an issue with sending empty messages.
```
[+0743s] Summarizing 2 Failures:
[+0743s]   [FAIL] Podman logs [It] podman logs partial log lines: json-file
[+0743s]   /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/e2e/logs_test.go:488
[+0743s]   [FAIL] Podman logs [It] podman logs partial log lines: k8s-file
[+0743s]   /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/e2e/logs_test.go:488
```

comments.body:
If you file CI issues always copy and paste the error once, the CI links will not be preserved forever, I think they are gone after 90 days.

Also a flake assumes this passed on rerun which it cannot because this is a bug in conmon https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28014 so the problem is with the image update
